character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of the group, giving orders to the crew, involved in a confrontation with Long John.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group, assigned to the north side during the watch.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group, assigned to the east side during the watch.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group, assigned to the west side during the watch.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A mutineer leading his men, attempting to negotiate with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A character whose words are referenced by the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A captain addressed by the mutineers during the negotiation.
